name: ExtensionComposition_Identifier
title: R5: identifier
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Composition.identifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Composition.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Composition.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`
*  R4B: `Composition.identifier` 0..1 `Identifier`
*  R4: `Composition.identifier` 0..1 `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Composition.identifier` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Composition.identifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Composition.identifier` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `Composition.identifier` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `Composition.identifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Composition.identifier` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Similar to ClinicalDocument/setId in CDA. See discussion in resource definition for how these relate.

element.definition: A version-independent identifier for the Composition. This identifier stays constant as the composition is changed over time.
element.comment: Similar to ClinicalDocument/setId in CDA. See discussion in resource definition for how these relate.
